questions.question: Explain the key difference between Explanation-Based Learning and Case-Based Reasoning in the context of Analytical Learning.
questions.hint: Explains the distinction between the two approaches

questions.question: A perfect domain theory for a given task is defined as a set of rules that can correctly classify all instances in the training set. Design an algorithm to construct such a theory using Explanation-Based Learning, and describe its time complexity.

An example-based method for learning a rule set uses a set of prototypes to guide the learning process. How does this approach differ from the sequential covering algorithm, and what are the advantages of using example-based methods?
questions.hint: Comparison of the two approaches and advantages of example-based methods
